_comment: Hardware-resolution rules. SKUs must match x_marathon_sku on product.product records. per_door_soft_close is picked when the configurator's soft_close flag is true; per_door otherwise. per_family adds cabinet-family-specific extras on top of per_cabinet.
_pull_override_comment: When resolve() is called with pull_finish=<key>, the legacy default pull SKUs (pull_default_skus, knob_default_skus) get stripped from the result and replaced with the finish-specific SKU from by_pull_finish[finish] / by_knob_finish[finish]. Finish keys match the snake_case form of attr_pull_finish values from southbrook_estimating/data/attributes.xml. Pull-size lookup falls through to 'default' when a specific size isn't seeded.
_appliance_pull_comment: Tall_oven and tall_fridge cabinets get an appliance pull per appliance-door front via the resolver's mount_appliance flag.
